## Polygon

- [ ] Drawn at https://geojson.io and pasted into `src/data/territories/<slug>.geojson`
- [ ] `firstYear` and `lastYear` set on each Feature

## Images

- [ ] All images are public domain or CC-licensed (Wikimedia Commons preferred)
- [ ] `public/entities/<slug>/attribution.txt` lists every image's source + license
- [ ] OR there are no images (acceptable for v1)

## Local check

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Polygon shows up on the map at the right place
- [ ] Side panel opens with the right name + year on click
